title: Fel's Advanced Weaponry
description: Powerful guns for defending your base
body:
![awa](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c512825676be994db71a32ed150b543daad87bd7.png)

### Fel's Advanced Weaponry (FAW) is a mod that add static machine guns to the game ready to use. This the continuation for the mod Fel's Machine Guns WWII and WWI with improved features.
 


![mg1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8463faf9ba875f9ac31f414ea1e1b42a3189044.png)
 

Features:
- Ready to use guns with no complex features.
- Immersive shooting and gun control
- Dedicated first person animations
- Improved aiming features with iron sights
 

This mod requires GeckoLib, IguanaLib, and Player Animator to work.


The mod is in beta, report bugs and suggest new guns on my [discord](https://discord.gg/t5UxRGwwFE).


If wanna support my work, support me on [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/c/FelinaMods) :3

 



![mg2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4afc4a9aafb134b8aee7f8ed50204149e297ebdd_0.webp)
